# Launchbox

> Coworking space in DHA Phase 5, Lahore — for freelancers, remote workers, startups, and small teams. High-speed internet, backup power, professional environment, no lock-in contracts.

## Key facts

- **Location:** First Floor, 38-A CCA, Sector C, DHA Phase 5, Lahore 54000, Pakistan
- **Hours:** Monday–Saturday, 9 AM – 9 PM (closed Sundays)
- **Phone:** +92 307 0555515
- **WhatsApp:** https://wa.me/923070555515
- **Email:** contact@launchboxpk.com
- **Google rating:** 5.0 ★ (25 reviews)
- **Website:** https://www.launchboxpk.com

## Pricing (PKR)

- Day Pass — 1,500 / day
- Flexible Desk — 15,000 / month (open seating, month-to-month)
- Dedicated Desk — 22,500 / month (always-reserved desk, includes meeting room hours, storage)
- Private Cabin — 20,000 / person / month (minimum 5 persons, 24/7 access, unlimited meeting room)

All plans include high-speed internet (150 Mbps fiber), backup power (UPS + generator), tea & coffee, common areas, kitchen, printing access. No deposits, no lock-in, cancel anytime.

Payment methods: bank transfer, JazzCash, EasyPaisa, cash. Payment due at start of each month.

## What's included in every plan

- High-speed internet: 150 Mbps dedicated fibre with backup ISP. Speeds hold up at 9 AM and 2 PM alike. Not shared residential broadband.
- Backup power: UPS plus generator covering the entire workspace. When LESCO takes a break, your work does not. No scrambling for an inverter mid-call.
- Tea & coffee: Stocked pantry, complimentary for every member, every visit.
- Common areas & kitchen: Lounge, breakout space, microwave, fridge, sink — fully kitted.
- Printing access: On-site printer for hard copies, contracts, and forms.
- Professional environment: Quiet, well-lit, AC throughout. Suitable for client video calls.

## Plan details

### Day Pass — PKR 1,500/day

Best for occasional use or trying the space out. Drop in for the day. Shared desk, high-speed internet, backup power, tea & coffee, common areas. No commitment. Walk-in friendly: WhatsApp message, show up, start working.

### Flexible Desk — PKR 15,000/month

Best for freelancers and independent workers. Open-seating shared desk, monthly. Pick any available spot when you arrive. Includes everything in the day pass plus community access.

### Dedicated Desk — PKR 22,500/month

Best for full-time freelancers and remote workers. Your own desk, reserved every day. Storage for your monitor and notebook. Meeting room hours included. Same spot every day with storage.

### Private Cabin — PKR 20,000/person/month (min 5 persons)

Best for teams of 5+ people. Enclosed cabin for teams. 24/7 access, unlimited meeting room, private storage. Minimum PKR 100,000/month. Scale up when you hire, downgrade if you contract — no penalty either way.

### Meeting rooms

Bookable by the hour. Screen, table, chairs, good acoustics, professional video-call backdrop. Included with Dedicated Desk and Private Cabin plans.

## No surprises — what you see is what you pay

- No deposits: Walk in, sign up, start working. No security amount held against your name. (Does not apply to private cabins.)
- No lock-in contracts: Every plan is month-to-month. Stay because the space works, not because a clause says so.
- No hidden fees: The price on the card is the full price. Internet, power, tea, kitchen — all included.
- Cancel anytime: Pause, leave, change your mind. No exit fees, no penalty paperwork.
- Upgrade or downgrade freely: Start with flexible desk and move to dedicated desk when ready. Or downgrade anytime.

## Cost comparison: office vs coworking

### Renting a small office in DHA Lahore

- Rent (DHA, 1-room): PKR 40,000–60,000
- Security deposit (3 months): PKR 120,000–180,000
- Electricity & gas: PKR 8,000–15,000
- Fibre internet: PKR 3,000–5,000
- UPS / generator: PKR 5,000–10,000
- Furniture (one-time): PKR 50,000–100,000
- Cleaning & maintenance: PKR 5,000–8,000
- Monthly total: PKR 60,000–100,000+

### Coworking at Launchbox

- Monthly total: PKR 15,000–100,000+ (depending on plan)
- Deposit: PKR 0
- Internet, power, tea, meeting rooms, furniture & setup: all included
- Savings: 50–80% vs renting your own office

## Who it's for

### Freelancers
Work on your own time, with your own clients. Quiet, fast workspace where deadlines don't get derailed by load-shedding or slow internet. Freelance developers building Shopify stores, SaaS dashboards, mobile apps for clients in the US, UK, and Gulf.

### Remote workers
Answer to a team in another city or country. Professional on video calls, with bandwidth that holds up across timezones. No more cafes, no more bedroom standups. Async standups in the morning, focused work through the day.

### Agencies and startup teams
5–10 people building something together. A private cabin gives you a real office without the deposit, lock-in, or furniture bill. Scale up when you grow, downgrade when you don't.

### Designers & creatives
Brand and product designers, illustrators, motion artists. Quiet workers who care about a clean desk and lighting that does not strain the eyes.

### Content creators
YouTubers, writers, video editors. Consistent, well-lit space for recording and the kind of internet that does not stutter on uploads.

### Consultants & advisors
Independent consultants between client calls. Day pass or flexible desk regulars who value a professional backdrop on Zoom.

### Job seekers
Preparing for international remote interviews. Video calls in the booths and the space's structure to keep momentum.

### Visiting professionals
In Lahore for a week of client meetings. Day passes give a working spot without booking a co-living or hotel suite.

## Real member scenarios

### Ahmed — Solo Freelancer
Freelance web developer in DHA Lahore with 3 international clients. Tired of unreliable Wi-Fi and family distractions at home. Picks the Dedicated Desk (PKR 22,500/mo) — saves time, earns more per hour, never misses a deadline.

### Fatima — 3-person Design Agency
Wanted a private office for client meetings without the lock-in of a 1-year lease and PKR 50–60k rent + deposit + furniture. Picks the Private Cabin (PKR 100,000/mo for 5 seats) — private space, no deposit, scales with the team.

### Usman — Visiting Lahore for a Week
Remote worker travelling through Lahore who just needs a desk and reliable internet for a few days. Picks the Day Pass (PKR 1,500/day) — drop in, work, leave, no commitment.

### Sara — Job-seeker preparing for interviews
Needs a quiet professional space for video interviews and prep work without the cafe noise. Picks the Flexible Desk (PKR 15,000/mo) — open seating, full month, change desks each day.

## Member testimonials

> "The internet has not blinked once in three months. That sounds like a small thing until you lose a client call."
— Freelance developer, Dedicated Desk member

> "My team grew from 3 to 6 in five months. We just told Launchbox and the cabin scaled with us. No penalties."
— Startup founder, Private Cabin member

> "Working from home was killing me. I needed a place where I felt like a professional again. The first week here, I shipped more than the previous month."
— Remote employee, Flexible Desk member

## The community

Freelancers, founders, remote workers, and small teams — all heads-down on real work. Quietly supportive, no forced networking.

### How the community works

- Quiet by default: Mornings are for deep work. Calls happen in meeting rooms, not at the open desks.
- No mandatory networking: No forced "community events," icebreakers, or branded socials. Real connections form when serious people work near each other.
- Organic over the kettle: The pantry is where conversations happen — by accident, between deep-work blocks.
- Respect for everyone's schedule: Some members work mornings, some run on US-Pacific hours. The space adapts.

### What members get out of it

- Collaborators on demand: Need a designer for a client project? Two desks down.
- Honest peer feedback: Members swap quick reads and gut checks on pitch decks and product pages.
- Referrals & introductions: When a freelancer is overbooked, the next gig often goes to the person sitting nearby.
- Shared knowledge: Tax tricks, banking workflows for international payments, dealing with foreign clients.

## Location: why DHA Phase 5

DHA Phase 5, near Packages Mall and Hussain Chowk. Easy to reach from Gulberg, Cantt, Model Town and Johar Town. Cafés, banks and food on the same block.

- Where Lahore's working professionals live — large concentration of tech talent, business owners, and remote workers.
- Reliable infrastructure — fewer outages, consistent power and internet.
- Connected to all of Lahore — direct main-road access from all major areas.
- Safe and professional — one of the most well-maintained areas in Lahore.
- Parking available nearby. Well-maintained roads and convenient ride-hailing access via Careem and inDrive.

## About Launchbox

We were the audience first. We started Launchbox because we couldn't find what we wanted as freelancers and remote workers in Lahore. Cafés had unreliable Wi-Fi and a forced food bill. Home offices killed momentum every time the lights went out. The available coworking spaces felt either overpriced for funded startups or stitched together as an afterthought.

We wanted a workspace that respected your time. Fast internet that holds up at 2 PM the same as 9 AM. Power that doesn't blink when LESCO does. Meeting rooms you can actually book. A community of people who are heads-down on real work, not networking events. And pricing that didn't require a funding round to afford.

### What we believe

- Earn the stay, every month: No deposits, no lock-in. We earn renewals through quality, not contracts.
- Affordable, not aspirational: Pricing is set for freelancers and early-stage teams — not funded startups with deep pockets.
- Infrastructure first: Reliable internet, backup power, and a chair that does not hurt at 5 PM.
- Community over noise: No networking events. Communities form quietly when serious people work near each other.
- Local, on purpose: Built in Lahore, run by Lahoris. Not a global chain trying to localise.
- Transparent pricing: The price on the card is the price you pay. No fine print.

### By the numbers

- 50+ members
- 4 plans to choose from
- 99.9% internet uptime
- 2+ years in DHA Phase 5

## A typical day at Launchbox

- Arrive in the morning: Park, walk up to the first floor, drop your bag at any desk (or yours, if dedicated). The AC is already on, internet is already up.
- Deep-work block: The 9–noon stretch is the most focused window. Headphones in, keyboards clicking, calls behind closed meeting-room doors.
- Lunch in DHA: Phase 5 is surrounded by food. Step out, eat at the pantry, or order in — riders know the building.
- Afternoon push, then home: After lunch the space fills up with international calls. By 6, the day is winding down. You head home with the work actually done.

## How to book a visit

No commitment, no sales pitch. Walk through. Try a desk. Check the internet speed. Meet the people who work here.

1. Message or call (+92 307 0555515 or WhatsApp)
2. We confirm a time
3. You visit the space

What you get: see the workspace and amenities, test internet speed and power backup, meet the people, ask every question face to face.

## Frequently asked questions

### What is Launchbox?
Launchbox is a coworking space in DHA Phase 5, Lahore. We offer day passes, flexible desks, dedicated desks, and private cabins for freelancers, remote workers, and small teams. Every plan includes high-speed internet, backup power, meeting room access, and a professional community.

### How much does it cost?
Day Pass: PKR 1,500/day. Flexible Desk: PKR 15,000/month. Dedicated Desk: PKR 22,500/month. Private Cabin: PKR 20,000/person/month (minimum 5 persons). All plans include internet, power, tea/coffee, and common area access. No hidden fees.

### Is there a contract or lock-in?
No. All plans are month-to-month. You can start, pause, or cancel anytime with no penalties or long-term commitments.

### What amenities do you offer?
Every plan includes high-speed internet, backup power, tea and coffee, access to common areas and the kitchen, printing access, and a professional work environment. Dedicated desks and private cabins also include storage space and meeting room access.

### Can I visit before joining?
Yes. Book a free visit through the website or message on WhatsApp to schedule a tour — no commitment, no sales pitch.

### What are your working hours?
Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 9 PM. Members with private cabins can arrange extended or 24/7 access.

### What payment methods do you accept?
Bank transfer, JazzCash, EasyPaisa, and cash. Payment is due at the start of each month.

### Where are you located?
First Floor, 38-A CCA, Sector C, DHA Phase 5, Lahore 54000, Pakistan. Near Packages Mall and Hussain Chowk. Easy to reach from Gulberg, Model Town, Johar Town, and Cantt.

### Is there parking available?
Parking exists near the space. DHA offers well-maintained roads and convenient ride-hailing access via Careem and inDrive.

### How do I sign up for a plan?
Visit the space, choose a plan that works for you, and start the same day. No lengthy onboarding — just pick a plan and begin working.

### Can I upgrade or switch plans later?
Yes. Move from flexible desk to dedicated desk or private cabin at any time, subject to availability. Plan adjustments take effect next billing cycle.

### Is coworking cheaper than renting an office?
Yes. A small office in DHA Lahore costs PKR 50,000–100,000+ per month all-in. Launchbox starts at PKR 1,500/day with everything included. Save 50–80%.

### How is coworking different from a cafe?
Coworking provides dedicated desks, reliable high-speed internet, backup power, meeting rooms, and professional environments. Cafes lack these guarantees.

### Flexible desk vs dedicated desk?
Flexible (PKR 15,000/mo) = any available desk in the shared area. Dedicated (PKR 22,500/mo) = your personal reserved desk, same spot every day, with storage.

### Is the internet reliable for video calls?
Yes. Dedicated high-speed fibre — not shared residential broadband. Built for video calls and uploads. Backup power keeps you online during load shedding.

## Service area

Lahore, Pakistan — primarily DHA Phase 5 and surrounding sectors (Phase 4, Phase 6, Cantt, Gulberg, Model Town, Johar Town).
